name: Yusys Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Yusys Technologies Co., Ltd. provides IT solutions to banking-based financial institutions in China. It offers consulting, software products, user experience design, software development and implementation, operation and maintenance, test, and system integration services. The company provides business products for core banking system, financial intermediations, and credit operation systems; channel products for channel management systems, counter systems, mobile banking, direct banking, telephone bank/call center, and self-service banking; and management products for back-office management solutions, business intelligence, and customer relationship management. Yusys Technologies Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 is headquartered in Beijing, China.
